scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @doorspeaks/api & npm run dev -w @doorspeaks/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @doorspeaks/shared && npm run build -w @doorspeaks/api && npm run build -w @doorspeaks/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @doorspeaks/shared && npm run typecheck -w @doorspeaks/api && npm run typecheck -w @doorspeaks/web
